---
title: "GAMM Examples"
author: "adlaplace"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format: 
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
jupyter: 
  kernel: ir
---

simple examples using gamm as alternative to gam
taken from help files for mgcv::gamm

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library("mgcv")
library("Matrix")
library("adlaplace")
```

```{r gamm}
dat <- gamSim(6, n = 200, scale = .2, dist = "poisson")
b2 <- gamm(y ~ s(x2),
    family = poisson,
    data = dat, random = list(fac = ~1)
)
plot(b2$gam, pages = 1)
```


```{r}
model_stuff <- adlaplace::model_setup(
  data = dat,
  formula = y ~ x1 + f(x2, model = "iwp", p = 2, knots = seq(0, 1, len = 11)) + f(fac, model = "iid")
)

config <- list(
  beta = rep(0, nrow(model_stuff$info$beta)),
  gamma = rep(0, nrow(model_stuff$info$gamma)),
  theta = rep(0, nrow(model_stuff$info$theta)),
  transform_theta = TRUE,
  groups = adlaplace::adFun_groups(model_stuff$data$ATp, Ngroups = 100),
  num_threads = 2L,
  verbose = TRUE,
  package = "adlaplace"
)

adFun <- adlaplace::getAdFun(model_stuff$data, config)
res <- adlaplace::logLikLaplace(
  x = c(config$beta, config$theta),
  adFun = adFun,
  config = c(config, list(verbose = FALSE)),
  deriv = TRUE
)
res$parameters
res$fval
res$grad
```
